hero.title: About MAZEN
hero.subtitle: Global GovTech leader since 1986 — transforming digital economies into auditable public revenue

history.title: Technology built for sovereign administrations
history.p1: MAZEN has delivered government technology solutions since 1986. We rely on a network of highly skilled collaborators across Europe, Asia and Africa and a sustainable R&D capability.
history.p2: Our teams combine expertise in data engineering, digital taxation, compliance and governance to serve demanding institutional environments.
history.p3: Our systems analyze and process 13 billion daily transactions and supervise over $15bn in operator flows since 2009.

partners.title: Our government partners
partners.description: Representative selection of partners that chose MAZEN as their official governance solution.
